description: Create a drone wing rib template in LibreCAD using the coordinate data from /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/naca0012_200mm.txt. Draw the rib profile as a closed loop on a cyan layer named 'PROFILE'. On a yellow layer named 'CUTOUTS', add three circles: a Main Spar (Center 50, 0; Diameter 10mm), a Rear Spar (Center 140, 0; Diameter 6mm), and a Lightening Hole (Center 95, 0; Diameter 24mm). Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/wing_rib.dxf.
